purpose: Record the intentional Spatial Forcing code state used by the LIBERO reproduction/calibration launchers without depending on the old dirty external checkout.
adapter_patch_intent: Teach openvla-SF/experiments/robot/libero/run_libero_eval.py to load LIBERO artifact-root .pruned_init init states.
Allow selected-task and episode-range evaluation for Slurm array cells and smoke tests.
Write per-episode CSV rows with policy, checkpoint, init-state path, success, step count, and error type.
Make rollout video saving optional so paper rollouts do not generate large video artifacts by default.
Leave FlashAttention2 disabled in openvla_utils.py because forcing it changed LIBERO evaluation behavior in local reproduction.
recreate_adapter_content: Apply patches/spatial_forcing_libero_artifact_eval.patch from the repository root of the Spatial-Forcing checkout.
Use the resulting openvla-SF directory as SF_REPO for LIBERO calibration and Layer 2 launchers.
parent_repo_tracking_decision: The nested adapter checkout is intentionally not added as a parent-repo gitlink here because its adapter commit is local to this shared artifact checkout and is recorded reproducibly by the patch file plus SHA256 instead.
